title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.

title: See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses.
summary: black and white card with headshots of susan credle, jayonta jenkins and tiffany rolfe

title: Halliburton enhances seismic workflow creation with Amazon Bedrock and Generative AI
summary: In this post, we'll explore how we built a proof-of-concept that converts natural language queries into executable seismic workflows while providing a question-answering capability for Halliburton's Seismic Engine tools and documentation. We'll cover the technical details of the solution, share evaluation results showing workflow acceleration of up to 95%, and discuss key learnings that can help other organizations enhance their complex technical workflows with generative AI.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Deploy and inference any model from HuggingFace
summary: Learn how to deploy any Hugging Face model in one session using Goose and Together's Dedicated Container Inference. Skip the setup complexity — one prompt gets your model running in a production-grade GPU environment on release day.

title: Serving DeepSeek-V4: why million-token context is an inference systems problem
summary: DeepSeek-V4 makes million-token context a serving-systems problem. Together AI explores the inference work behind V4 on NVIDIA HGX B200, including compressed KV layouts, prefix caching, kernel maturity, and endpoint profiles for long-context workloads.

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned as installing an AI agent on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as a native product in the company's lineup.

title: GLM-5-Turbo release
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company says GLM-5 reaches open-source SOTA on benchmarks such as SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-5 flagship model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI launched GLM-5 as a new flagship base model for agent engineering. The company highlights open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, described as a 100B-class open-source visual reasoning model with strong global performance. It also supports tool calling and 128K long context for automated task completion.

title: AutoGLM agent model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: CogAgent-9B open source release
summary: Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader agent ecosystem. The model is trained from GLM-4V-9B for specialized agent tasks and uses screenshots as input without requiring HTML or other text.

title: GLM-OS concept and Agent products launch
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This marked a broader push into an operating-system-like agent ecosystem.

title: AutoGLM Agent OpenDay progress update
summary: At its Agent OpenDay, Zhipu AI shared new AutoGLM capabilities including autonomous execution of more than 50 steps and cross-app task handling. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing and highlighted more advanced autonomous web and computer operation scenarios.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and better usability. The release was published on April 23, 2026 as a model update.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The announcement was published on April 9, 2026.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model campus recruitment program, including internship opportunities. The recruitment news was posted on April 1, 2026.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. This model announcement was published on February 16, 2026.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 on February 14, 2026. The post presents it as a major model release from the company.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, describing it as offering deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The model announcement was published on February 13, 2026.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0 on February 12, 2026. The announcement marks a new model release in the company's lineup.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The release was published on December 24, 2025.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent product described as marking a new era focused on delivering business value.

title: 01.AI LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT, signaling external validation for the product.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and noted it as open-source.
